name: Liyo
summary: A single human operator paired with a 15-skill agent team handles end-to-end software delivery: intake, architecture decomposition, frontend, backend, ops, design, QA, and debug. Work is delivered repo-in / repo-out, coordinated entirely through GitHub Issues, with per-repo dynamic staffing that scales to task complexity and releases on completion.

operator.background: 7 years in computer science, including 4 years at a top-5 international cryptocurrency exchange

delivery_model.staffing: per-repo dynamic, scales with task complexity, releases on completion
